text_block_list.text:
One day, Seiun Sky and Matikanefukukitaru are
having a heated conversation in the central plaza.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yep, the key to coming first in a race is ingenuity.
No doubt about it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
No, it's luck. You know what they say—luck is a
skill in itself!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat? Luck's just what people call it when they
look back on something that happened to go
well.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Well then, prove it. Try to catch me in the
next twenty minutes.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But bear in mind that my fortune for today was
"transcendently happy," so you've got no chance.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh! What's Shiraoki doing over there?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huh, where?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Now's my chance!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Wait, whoa! What's a banana peel doing heeere?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Your cowardly plan has been foiled! No doubt
because fortune itself is my ally!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oops... She got away. Still, there's no way you
can win just by being lucky.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Fukukitaru will have to walk down the
hallway when she comes back to the classroom.
That'll be my chance to grab her.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: This is gonna be a win for ingenuity.

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
Oh, great timing, Seiun Sky. Would you mind
helping me carry some paperwork?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: (Another hitch?!)

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Heh, if I just go behind the teacher while Sky's
distracted...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Um, I don't think I'll be able to carry all this stuff
on my own. Can I ask someone else to help too?

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text: If you'd like, sure...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hear that, Fukukitaru?! Gimme a hand!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Eep! You saw me?! I really thought I could slip
past!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I did it, Fukukitaru. I caught you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Turning fortune to your favor right at the last moment... Incredible.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Naaah, it was nothing. Actually, I want to thank
you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You really helped me learn something.

Thanks to this experience, Seiun Sky further
refines her adaptability and becomes even better
at responding to different situations.
